headline: Navitas Semiconductor shares are trading higher. The company announced the launch of two new packages, top-side cooled QDPAK and a low-profile TO-247-4L, to its 5th-gen GeneSiC technology platform.
summary: Navitas Semiconductor shares are trading higher. The company announced the launch of two new packages, top-side cooled QDPAK and a low-profile TO-247-4L, to its 5th-gen GeneSiC technology platform.

headline: 3 Top AI Giants With Solid Short-Term Price and Long-Term EPS Upside
summary: DELL, MPWR and HPE pair AI infrastructure momentum with strong long-term EPS growth and notable short-term price upside.
